disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New-onset severe one-sided throbbing headache over the temple, present 5 days, unrelieved by paracetamol, in a patient in her seventies
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me about the headache?
Where exactly is the pain and how long have you had it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a really bad throbbing pain on the right side of my head near my temple. It came on about five days ago and it just won't stop — the paracetamol does nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Scalp tenderness — burning, sore scalp when brushing hair or resting the head on a pillow
trigger_question_examples: Is your scalp or the skin on your head tender?
Does anything touching your head make it worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — my scalp burns and stings when I brush my hair, and it hurts to rest that side of my head on the pillow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain and tiring of the jaw muscles when chewing, relieved by resting the jaw (has to stop eating solid food)
trigger_question_examples: Does your jaw hurt or get tired when you chew?
What happens to the jaw pain when you stop chewing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I chew, my jaw aches and gets so tired I have to stop — then it eases off after a minute of resting it. I've given up on solid food because of it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Systemic features — profound fatigue, feeling feverish/sweaty, and unintentional weight loss of around 2 kg over two weeks
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt generally unwell, feverish or tired?
Have you lost any weight without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been wiped out and a bit feverish and sweaty, and I've lost about 2 kilos in the last fortnight without meaning to.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Aching and stiffness across both shoulders / proximal muscles
trigger_question_examples: Do your shoulders or hips feel stiff or achy, especially in the mornings?
Any aching or stiffness in your neck, shoulders or upper arms?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my shoulders have been stiff and achy too.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No visual disturbance currently — denies any blurring, double vision, transient or permanent loss of vision, or a curtain/shadow over the eye
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any change in your eyesight — blurring, double vision, or any loss of vision even briefly?
Any shadow or curtain coming down over either eye?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my eyesight has been fine — no blurring, no blackouts, nothing like a curtain over my eye.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: My eyes seem okay, it's really the headache and my jaw that are the problem.
